title: dipterocarpus caudatus subsp. penangianus
intro: Dipterocarpus caudatus subsp. penangianus is a subspecies of Dipterocarpus caudatus, a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Dipterocarpus caudatus subsp. penangianus is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
